heading_content_part: Privacy Policy of Q Locker AppsSkip to main contentPrivacy Policy of Q Locker AppsThis Privacy Policy ("Policy") applies to your use ofQ Lockerapps ("Applications" or "Application"), including but not limited toGesture Lock ScreenandDoor Lock Screen.This Policy covers our collection, use and disclosure of your information through the Applications. It does not cover any collection, use or disclosure by third parties through the Applications.

Information collectedWe do not collect personal information.We may collect non-personal information when you send us feedback. Non-personal information may include, but not limited to, your Android version, device model, and phone language. Before you send us the email, you can always feel free to delete all the information.
Use of collected informationWe use collected information to reproduce, identify and fix problems.
Disclosure of collected informationWe will not disclose any information to others.

Third party servicesWe may utilize some third party services to provide better functionality for our users. Please be advised that the third party services are independent from us, and may collect non-personal and/or personal information about you. We assume no responsibility or liability whatsoever with regard to privacy matters or any other legal matter with respect to the third party services. We encourage you to carefully read the privacy policies of the third party services.View

Changes to this PolicyThis Privacy Policy may change over time. We will post the updated privacy policy on this page. Please come back to this page every now and then to make sure you are familiar with the latest version. Any new policy will be effective from the date it is published by us.
Contact usIf you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at cutetools at outlook dot com.Powered by Blogger
